name: 8 Ball
notes: Per scored card in play: if card rank == 8 and probability check passes (1/extra where extra=4), create a Tarot consumable. config.extra=4 (1-in-4 odds).

name: Abstract Joker
notes: +3 Mult for each joker on the board (including itself). config.extra=3. In Lua: counts G.jokers.cards where ability.set=='Joker', then mult_mod = count * extra.

name: Acrobat
notes: X3 Mult on the final hand of the round (hands_left == 0). config.extra=3 (Xmult_mod). Fires in joker_main else branch.

name: Ancient Joker
notes: Per scored card in play: if card's suit matches the round's random 'ancient suit', X1.5 Mult. config.extra=1.5. The suit is chosen randomly each round (G.GAME.current_round.ancient_card.suit).

name: Arrowhead
notes: +50 Chips for each scored Spades card. config.extra=50.

name: Banner
notes: +30 Chips per remaining discard this round. config.extra=30. chip_mod = discards_left * 30. Fires in joker_main else branch only when discards_left > 0.

name: Baron
notes: Each King held in hand gives X1.5 Mult. config.extra=1.5. Fires in held-card context (cardarea=="hand", card id==13, not debuffed). Returns h_mult-style xMult (h_x_mult in Lua: x_mult field on held return).

name: Baseball Card
notes: For each Uncommon (rarity 2) joker on the board (other than itself), X1.5 Mult. config.extra=1.5. Fires in other_joker context: Xmult_mod = 1.5 per qualifying joker.

name: Blackboard
notes: X3 Mult if ALL cards in the held hand are black suits (Spades or Clubs, with smear). config.extra=3. Fires in joker_main else branch. Checks G.hand.cards (not scoring hand — the full held hand).

name: Blue Joker
notes: Adds +2 chips per card remaining in deck. extra=2. Fires in joker_main when deck is non-empty.

name: Blueprint
notes: Copies the joker immediately to its right on the board. config={}. Fires before any context — mirrors the right neighbour's calculate_joker return.

name: Bootstraps
notes: Adds +2 mult for every $5 the player holds (floor). extra={mult=2, dollars=5}. Fires in joker_main when floor(dollars/5) >= 1.

name: Brainstorm
notes: Copies the leftmost joker on the board (G.jokers.cards[1]). config={}. Same loop-guard as Blueprint (blueprint counter).

name: Bull
notes: Adds +2 chips per dollar held (max(0, dollars)). extra=2. Fires in joker_main when dollars > 0.

name: Burglar
notes: At blind-setting (setting_blind / before context): removes all discards for the round and grants +3 hands. extra=3. Side-effect only, returns no scoring Fx.

name: Burnt Joker
notes: On first discard of the round (pre_discard, discards_used == 0): levels up the hand type being discarded. extra=4 (h_size config unused here). Side-effect only.

name: Business Card
notes: Per scored face card (J/Q/K): 1-in-2 chance to earn $2. extra=2 (the probability denominator). Returns dollars=2 on success.

name: Caino
notes: Xmult = caino_xmult (starts at 1, persistent). Gains +1 xmult per face card destroyed (cards_destroyed / remove_playing_cards contexts). extra=1 (increment per face card). Fires scoring in joker_main only when caino_xmult > 1.

name: Campfire
notes: Gains +0.25 Xmult each time a card is sold (selling_card context); applies stored Xmult via generic x_mult>1 path in joker_main; resets to 1 at end of boss-blind round. extra=0.25, initial x_mult=1.

name: Card Sharp
notes: Gives X3 Xmult when the current hand type has been played more than once this round (played_this_round > 1). extra.Xmult=3.

name: Cartomancer
notes: Creates a Tarot card in consumable area when blind is set (setting_blind context), if consumable limit not reached. No scoring effect.

name: Castle
notes: Tracks a random suit each round (castle_card.suit). On discard of that suit: stored chips += chip_mod(3). In joker_main applies chip_mod = stored chips. config: extra={chips=0, chip_mod=3}.

name: Cavendish
notes: Gives X3 Xmult unconditionally. At end of round: 1/1000 probability of self-destruction. Only appears when Gros Michel is extinct. extra={odds=1000, Xmult=3}.

name: Ceremonial Dagger
notes: On setting_blind: destroys joker immediately to its right and gains sell_cost*2 flat mult (stored in ability.mult, initial=0). In joker_main: applies stored mult if >0. config: mult=0.

name: Certificate
notes: On first_hand_drawn: adds a random playing card with a random seal (Red/Blue/Gold/Purple, uniform 25% each) to the player's hand. No scoring effect.

name: Chicot
notes: On setting_blind (and on add_to_deck): if the current blind is a boss blind, disables its effect entirely. No scoring contribution.

name: Constellation
notes: Gains +0.1 Xmult each time a Planet card is used (using_consumeable context, set=='Planet'). Applies stored Xmult via generic x_mult>1 path in joker_main. config: extra=0.1, Xmult=1 (initial x_mult=1).

name: Diet Cola
notes: On selling self, adds a Double Tag. No scoring effect; fires only in selling_self context which has no scoring counterpart in Score.kt. config = {}
kotlin:
// j_diet_cola fires on selling_self (add_tag(Tag('tag_double')))
// No scoring-cascade effect — skip in calcJoker; handled by a sell hook.

name: DNA
notes: On first hand played (hands_played == 0) and full_hand has exactly 1 card, copies that card into the deck and hand permanently. config = {}

name: Driver's License
notes: In joker_main: if enhanced-card count in deck (driver_tally) >= 16, apply Xmult_mod = 3. Tally recomputed each hand from playing_cards. config = {extra = 3}. unlock_condition requires 16 enhanced cards.

name: Dusk
notes: In repetition context (cardarea == G.play): if hands_left == 0, retrigger each scored card once. config = {extra = 1}. Fires once per scored card when it is the last hand.

name: Egg
notes: At end of round (not individual, not repetition): extra_value += extra (3), increasing sell price. No scoring effect. config = {extra = 3}.

name: Erosion
notes: In joker_main: mult_mod = extra * (starting_deck_size - current_deck_size), if that delta > 0. config = {extra = 4}. Requires deck-size tracking.

name: Even Steven
notes: Per scored card (individual, cardarea play): if card id is even and 0 <= id <= 10 (i.e. 2,4,6,8,10), add mult = 4. config = {extra = 4}.

name: Faceless Joker
notes: On discard (context.discard, triggered once per discard via other_card == full_hand[last]): if full_hand contains >= 3 face cards, earn $5. config = {extra = {dollars=5, faces=3}}.

name: Fibonacci
notes: Per scored card (individual, cardarea play): if card id is 2, 3, 5, 8, or 14 (Ace), add mult = 8. config = {extra = 8}.

name: Flash Card
notes: Gains +2 mult (extra=2) per shop reroll (context.reroll_shop); fires in joker_main if accumulated mult > 0 as mult_mod. Starting mult=0 from game.lua config.
kotlin: "j_flash" -> if (j.mult > 0) return Fx().apply { multMod = j.mult }

name: Flower Pot
notes: Fires in joker_main; checks scoring hand contains at least one card of each of the four suits (H/D/S/C), using smeared suit matching for non-Wild cards and base suit for Wild cards to fill gaps. Returns xMult_mod=3 (extra=3) if all four suits present.

name: Fortune Teller
notes: Fires in joker_main; mult_mod equals G.GAME.consumeable_usage_total.tarot (total tarots used lifetime). extra=1 per game.lua but the actual value used is the running tarot count, not extra. Needs external tarot-usage counter injected into FJoker.mult or Sctx.
kotlin:
// j.mult is used here to carry the tarot-usage count (G.GAME.consumeable_usage_total.tarot)
"j_fortune_teller" -> if (j.mult > 0) return Fx().apply { multMod = j.mult }

name: Gift Card
notes: End-of-round only (not scoring cascade): adds extra=1 to extra_value of every joker and consumeable card, effectively raising their sell/buy price by $1. Produces no chip/mult effect during scoring.

name: Glass Joker
notes: Starting x_mult=1 (Xmult=1 in config), gains +0.75 (extra=0.75) per glass card destroyed. Fires in joker_main via the generic x_mult>1 handler: Xmult_mod=self.ability.x_mult. j.x carries the current accumulated x_mult (starts at 1.0).
kotlin: "j_glass" -> if (j.x > 1.0) return Fx().apply { xMultMod = j.x }

name: Golden Ticket
notes: Fires individual (cardarea=play) per scored card; if card has Gold enhancement (ability.name=='Gold Card') grants $4 (extra=4). Economic effect only — no chips/mult. Needs money cascade feature.
kotlin: "j_ticket" -> if (oc.enhancement == Enhancement.GOLD) return Fx() // $4 money effect; no chips/mult — needs money cascade

name: Green Joker
notes: config extra={hand_add=1, discard_sub=1}. In context.before (hand played): mult += hand_add (scaling, not scoring). In joker_main: mult_mod=accumulated mult if >0. In discard context (last card of discard): mult = max(0, mult - discard_sub). j.mult carries the accumulated mult state.

name: Gros Michel
notes: config extra={odds=6, mult=15}. In joker_main: mult_mod=15. In end_of_round: 1-in-6 probability check (pseudorandom); if triggered, self-destructs and sets pool_flags.gros_michel_extinct. Needs probability and destroy features.
kotlin:
"j_gros_michel" -> if (ctx.jokerMain) return Fx().apply { multMod = 15.0 }
// end_of_round extinction (1/6 chance) handled outside scoring cascade — needs probability+destroy

name: Hack
notes: config extra=1. Fires in repetition context (cardarea=play): if scored card id is 2, 3, 4, or 5, returns repetitions=extra=1 (card scores one extra time).
kotlin:
"j_hack" -> if (ctx.repetition && ctx.cardarea == "play" && oc != null &&
    oc.id in setOf(2, 3, 4, 5)) return Fx().apply { repetitions = 1 }

name: Joker
notes: Always adds +4 mult; config.mult = 4. Generic joker_main else block (card.lua:3980).
kotlin: "j_joker" -> return Fx().apply { multMod = 4.0 }

name: Half Joker
notes: +20 mult when the played hand has ≤3 cards; config.extra = {mult=20, size=3}. joker_main else block (card.lua:3672).
kotlin: "j_half" -> if (ctx.fullHand.size <= 3) return Fx().apply { multMod = 20.0 }

name: Hallucination
notes: 1-in-2 chance to create a Tarot card when any booster pack is opened (context.open_booster); config.extra = 2. No scoring effect — purely consumable creation.

name: Hanging Chad
notes: Retriggers the FIRST card in the scoring hand 2 extra times; config.extra = 2. Fires in context.repetition + cardarea=play when otherCard == scoringHand[0] (card.lua:3352).

name: Hiker
notes: Each scored played card permanently gains +5 chips (perma_bonus); config.extra = 5. Fires individual/play (card.lua:3067). The +5 is a permanent card mutation, not a transient score bonus.

name: Hit the Road
notes: Each discarded Jack raises x_mult by +0.5 (config.extra=0.5, Xmult starts at 1); resets to 1 at end-of-round. In joker_main, applies current x_mult if >1. context.discard (card.lua:2835), end_of_round reset (3011), joker_main generic else (3653).

name: Hologram
notes: Each playing card added to hand raises x_mult by +0.25 (config.extra=0.25, Xmult starts at 1); joker_main applies current x_mult when >1. context.playing_card_added (card.lua:2457), joker_main generic else (3653).

name: Ice Cream
notes: Adds current chips (starts 100, decreases by 5 after each hand) as chip_mod in joker_main; config.extra = {chips=100, chip_mod=5}. The chip decrement (and self-destruct when chips reach 0) happens in context.after. joker_main else (card.lua:3915), after decrement (3571).

name: Invisible Joker
notes: No scoring effect. Counts rounds held (config.extra=2); when sold after ≥2 rounds held, duplicates a random other joker. Fires in context.end_of_round (increments invis_rounds, card.lua:2934) and context.selling_self (2371).

name: Joker Stencil
notes: XMult = emptyJokerSlots + stencilCount; x_mult pre-computed as (capacity - jokerCount) + count_of_stencils; fires only when emptySlots > 0; config = {}

name: Loyalty Card
notes: XMult ×4 every 6th hand played (cycle length = every+1 = 6); extra = {Xmult=4, every=5}; loyalty_remaining = (every-1 - (handsPlayed - handsPlayedAtCreate)) % (every+1); fires when loyalty_remaining == every

name: Luchador
notes: No scoring effect; on self-sell disables the current Boss blind if one is active and not already disabled; config = {}; entirely outside the scoring cascade

name: Lucky Cat
notes: When a Lucky Card enhancement procs (lucky_trigger), scales x_mult += 0.25; initial x_mult=1 (from config.Xmult=1), extra=0.25; enhancement_gate='m_lucky'

name: Madness
notes: At setting_blind (non-boss): x_mult += 0.5, destroy random non-eternal joker; config extra=0.5; x_mult starts at 1; fires outside scoring cascade

name: Mail-In Rebate
notes: In discard context: if discarded card's id matches current_round.mail_card.id (a random rank set each round), earn $5 (config extra=5); entirely outside scoring cascade

name: Marble Joker
notes: At setting_blind: adds one Stone-enhanced card to the deck (and increases deck limit by 1); config extra=1; entirely outside scoring cascade

name: Matador
notes: At joker_main (and debuffed_hand): earn $8 if the boss blind has triggered (blind.triggered); config extra=8; earn money only, no mult/chips

name: Midas Mask
notes: In before-scoring context (cardarea=jokers, before=true): converts all face cards (J/Q/K) in the scoring hand to Gold enhancement; config={}; blueprint_compat=false

name: Mime
notes: Retriggers each held card once (extra=1) if that card has any scoring effects. Fires in both regular scoring (context.repetition + cardarea==hand) and end_of_round repetition pass.

name: Misprint
notes: Adds a random mult each hand: pseudorandom integer in [min=0, max=23]. config.extra = {min=0, max=23}.

name: Mr. Bones
notes: Fires in end_of_round context when context.game_over==true and accumulated chips >= 25% of blind chips. Saves the run and self-destructs. config = {} (no ability params).

name: Mystic Summit
notes: Adds +15 mult when discards remaining this round == d_remaining (default 0). config.extra = {mult=15, d_remaining=0}.

name: Obelisk
notes: BEFORE: if current hand type has been played more than all others, increment j.x (Xmult) by 0.2; if another hand type ties or exceeds, reset j.x to 1. JOKER_MAIN: generic x_mult path applies j.x when j.x > 1. config.extra=0.2, config.Xmult=1 (start). blueprint skipped.

name: Odd Todd
notes: Per scored card: +31 chips if card rank is odd pip (A=14, 3, 5, 7, 9) — i.e. id%2==1 for id in [0,10] OR id==14. config.extra=31.

name: Onyx Agate
notes: Per scored card: +7 mult if card is Clubs suit. config.extra=7.

name: Perkeo
notes: Fires at ending_shop: picks a random consumable from inventory and creates a Negative-edition copy of it in the consumables area. No scoring effect. config = {} (no params).

name: Photograph
notes: Per scored card: x2 mult (xMult) on the first face card (J/Q/K) in the scoring hand. Only the earliest face card in scoring hand order triggers it. config.extra=2.

name: Popcorn
notes: Starts with +20 Mult (config mult=20, extra=4). Fires mult_mod=j.mult in joker_main when mult>0. At end of round (blind beaten), decrements mult by 4; self-destructs when mult reaches 0.

name: Raised Fist
notes: Held-card joker. Finds the lowest-rank non-Stone card in hand (base.id lowest, base.nominal value). If other_card is that card, returns h_mult = 2 * card.nominal (nominal = rank pip value, e.g. Ace=1 in nominal but id=14).

name: Ramen
notes: Starts with Xmult=2 (config Xmult=2, extra=0.01). In joker_main fires via generic x_mult>1 path (Xmult_mod=j.x). On each discard event, x decrements by 0.01; self-destructs when x-0.01<=1 (i.e. x<=1.01).

name: Red Card
notes: config extra=3. Gains +3 Mult each time a booster pack is skipped (skipping_booster context). In joker_main returns mult_mod=j.mult when mult>0.

name: Reserved Parking
notes: config extra={odds=2, dollars=1}. Held-card joker. For each face card held, 1-in-2 probability chance to earn $1.

name: Ride the Bus
notes: config extra=1 (increment per no-face hand). In joker_main fires mult_mod=j.mult when mult>0. On each hand played (before=false joker_main scoring), if any scoring card is face, resets mult to 0; otherwise j.mult+=1. At end_of_round resets mult to 0.

name: Riff-raff
notes: config extra=2. On first_hand_drawn, creates up to 2 common random jokers (if joker slots available). No scoring effect.

name: Rocket
notes: config extra={dollars=1, increase=2}. Earns $extra.dollars at end of round (calculate_dollar_bonus). When the boss blind is defeated, extra.dollars += extra.increase (2). No mult/chip scoring effect.

name: Rough Gem
notes: config extra=1. Individual per scored card. If the scored card is Diamonds suit, earn $1 (dollars=extra=1). No mult/chip bonus.

name: Runner
notes: Gains +15 chips each time a Straight is scored (before pass); applies accumulated chips in joker_main. game.lua: config={extra={chips=0, chip_mod=15}}. Lua: before→if Straight next() and not blueprint, chips+=chip_mod, return upgrade. joker_main→return chip_mod=extra.chips.

name: Scary Face
notes: Gives +30 chips for each face card (J/Q/K) scored in played hand. game.lua: config={extra=30}. Lua: individual, cardarea==G.play, other_card:is_face() → return {chips=self.ability.extra}.
kotlin: "j_scary_face" -> if (oc.isFace) return Fx().apply { chips = 30.0 }

name: Scholar
notes: Gives +20 chips and +4 mult for each Ace scored. game.lua: config={extra={mult=4, chips=20}}. Lua: individual, cardarea==G.play, other_card:get_id()==14 → return {chips=20, mult=4}. Already present in Score.kt line 77.
kotlin: "j_scholar" -> if (oc.id == 14) return Fx().apply { chips = 20.0; mult = 4.0 }

name: Seance
notes: If the scored hand is a Straight Flush, creates a random Spectral card (if consumable slot available). game.lua: config={extra={poker_hand='Straight Flush'}}. Lua: joker_main (!before), cardarea==G.jokers, poker_hands['Straight Flush'] next() → create Spectral.

name: Seeing Double
notes: Applies x2 Xmult if scoring hand contains at least one Club AND at least one non-Club suit card. Wild Cards fill in missing suit slots preferring Clubs first. game.lua: config={extra=2}. Lua: joker_main (!before), separate Wild Card from normal cards, count suits, require Clubs>0 AND (Hearts>0 OR Diamonds>0 OR Spades>0).

name: Seltzer
notes: Retriggers every scored card once per hand played; has 10 uses total (extra=10). Each hand (before pass) decrements counter by 1; at 0 the joker self-destructs. game.lua: key=j_selzer (note spelling), config={extra=10}. Lua: retrigger context → return {repetitions=1}. Before context → decrement extra; if extra-1<=0 remove joker.

name: Shoot the Moon
notes: Each Queen (id=12) held in hand (not scored) gives +13 mult. game.lua: config={extra=13}. Lua: context.cardarea==G.hand, other_card:get_id()==12, not debuffed → return {h_mult=13}.
kotlin:
// HELD-IN-HAND pass (ctx.cardarea == "hand" && oc != null && !ctx.individual):
"j_shoot_the_moon" -> if (oc.id == 12) return Fx().apply { hMult = 13.0 }

name: Sixth Sense
notes: When a single 6 is played as the first hand of the round, that card is destroyed and a random Spectral card is created. game.lua: config={}. Lua: context.destroying_card (not blueprint), full_hand has exactly 1 card, that card id==6, current_round.hands_played==0 → create Spectral, return true.

name: Smiley Face
notes: Gives +5 mult for each face card (J/Q/K) scored in played hand. game.lua: config={extra=5}. Lua: individual, cardarea==G.play, other_card:is_face() → return {mult=self.ability.extra}.
kotlin: "j_smiley" -> if (oc.isFace) return Fx().apply { mult = 5.0 }

name: Sock and Buskin
notes: Retriggers each scored face card once; config.extra=1 (repetitions=1)

name: Space Joker
notes: 1-in-4 chance (probabilities.normal/extra, extra=4) to level up the played hand type in the before context

name: Spare Trousers
notes: before: if Two Pair or Full House, j.mult += 2 (config.extra=2, starts mult=0); joker_main: emit mult_mod=j.mult if >0

name: Square Joker
notes: before: if exactly 4 cards in full hand, j.x.chips += 4 (chip_mod=4, chips starts at 0); joker_main: emit chipMod=j.x.chips

name: Steel Joker
notes: joker_main: Xmult_mod = 1 + 0.2 * (count of steel-enhanced cards in full deck); config.extra=0.2; fires only if steel count > 0

name: Stone Joker
notes: joker_main: chip_mod = 25 * (count of stone-enhanced cards in full deck); config.extra=25; fires only if stone count > 0

name: Stuntman
notes: joker_main: flat +250 chips; config.extra.chip_mod=250 (also reduces hand size by 2 passively, not a score effect)

name: Supernova
notes: joker_main: mult_mod = number of times the current hand type has been played this run; config.extra=1 (unused at score time)

name: Superposition
notes: joker_main (before): if scoring hand contains ≥1 Ace AND hand type is Straight AND consumeable slot available, create a Tarot card; config={} (no params)

name: Swashbuckler
notes: Adds +Mult equal to the total sell value of all other jokers. j.mult is precomputed by a recalc pass (card.lua:4240-4248) that sums sell_cost of every other joker on the board. Fires in the joker_main 'else' branch (neither before nor after). config: {mult = 1} (initial, but overwritten by recalc).
kotlin: "j_swashbuckler" -> if (ctx.jokerMain && j.mult > 0) return Fx().apply { multMod = j.mult }

name: The Idol
notes: Gives X2 Mult for each scored card that matches the current round's idol card (specific rank AND suit). idol_card is chosen randomly each round by reset_idol_card(). config: {extra = 2}. Fires in individual (cardarea == play). The idol_card id/suit is round-level external state not in Sctx.

name: Throwback
notes: Gives XMult = 1 + (blinds_skipped × 0.25). x_mult is precomputed each recalc as `1 + G.GAME.skips * extra` (card.lua:4177) and stored on the ability. Fires via the generic `self.ability.x_mult > 1` joker_main path (card.lua:3653). config: {extra = 0.25}. j.x holds the precomputed x_mult value (1.0 = base, grows with each skip).
kotlin: "j_throwback" -> if (ctx.jokerMain && j.x > 1.0) return Fx().apply { xMultMod = j.x }

name: To Do List
notes: Earns $4 if the played poker hand matches the current to-do hand. At end of round, randomises to a new (different) hand (card.lua:2975-2983). Fires in context.before (cardarea == jokers). config: {extra = {dollars = 4, poker_hand = 'High Card'}}. The to_do_poker_hand is stored as FJoker external state; Score.kt currently has no 'before' pass for jokers.

name: Trading Card
notes: Earns $3 when the first discard of the round contains exactly 1 card (fired in discard context, not scoring: card.lua:2802-2811). Condition: discards_used <= 0 AND fullHand.size == 1. config: {extra = 3}. This is entirely outside the scoring cascade — it fires on a discard event, not during hand scoring.

name: Triboulet
notes: Gives X2 Mult for each scored King (id=13) or Queen (id=12). Fires in individual pass (cardarea == play). config: {extra = 2}.
kotlin: "j_triboulet" -> if (ctx.individual && ctx.cardarea == "play" && oc != null && (oc.id == 12 || oc.id == 13)) return Fx().apply { xMult = 2.0 }

name: Turtle Bean
notes: At end of round, reduces hand size by 1 (h_mod=1). Destroys itself when h_size reaches 0 (h_size starts at 5, shrinks each round). config: {extra = {h_size = 5, h_mod = 1}}. Fires in context.end_of_round (card.lua:2903-2933). Not a scoring effect — no chips/mult output.

name: Vagabond
notes: Creates a Tarot card (if consumable slot available) when $dollars <= 4 at the start of the hand (before scoring). Fires in context.before (cardarea == jokers). config: {extra = 4} (the dollar threshold). Needs consumable slot check and game-state dollar read.

name: Vampire
notes: In the 'before' pass: strips enhancements from all scored cards and accumulates XMult +0.1 per enhanced card stripped (j.x += 0.1 * count). In jokerMain: the accumulated j.x > 1.0 fires via the generic x_mult path (card.lua:3653). config: {extra = 0.1, Xmult = 1} — extra=0.1 per card, starting x_mult=1. j.x stores the running XMult (starts at 1.0).

name: Walkie Talkie
notes: Per scored card in play area: if card rank is 10 or 4, give +10 chips and +4 mult. Config: extra.chips=10, extra.mult=4.

name: Wee Joker
notes: Scaling: each scored 2 increments stored chips by chip_mod=8 (j.x tracks accumulated chips, init 0). In joker_main applies accumulated chips as chipMod.

name: Yorick
notes: Discard-triggered scaling: tracks yorick_discards counter (init=23, extra.discards=23). Each discard decrements counter; when it reaches <=1, reset to 23 and add +1 to x_mult (extra.xmult=1, x_mult starts at 1). In joker_main the accumulated x_mult is applied via generic x_mult handler.
